results.rendered_html:
su—ṣumṇa or su—ṣumna, mf(ā)n. very gracious or kind,  RV. ;  VS. ;
m. N. of one of the 7 principal rays of the sun (supposed to supply heat to the moon),  VP. ;
(ā), f. a partic. artery (prob. ‘the carotid’) or vein of the body (lying between those called iḍā and piṅgalā, and supposed to be one of the passages for the breath or spirit; cf. brahma-randhra),  Up. ;  BhP. ;  Rājat.

results.rendered_html:
suṣumṇa und ˚mna (so stets  ṚV. )
1〉 adj. sehr gnädig, huldvoll  ṚV. 5,75,2 . 6,49,10 . 50,3 . 10,104,5 . 132,2 .  VS. 18,40 . 38,28 .
— 2〉 m. ein best. Sonnenstrahl (vgl.  VS. 18,40 )  COLEBR. Misc. Ess. 1,154 .  VP. 236, N. 3 .
— 3〉 f. ā
a〉 die Kopfader, Carotis  MAITRYUP. 6,21 .  Ind. St. 1,448. fgg.  450 . 2,48. fgg.  58 . 171. fgg.  9,34. fgg.  36 .  WEBER, RĀMAT. UP. 336  (susumnā).  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 104,b,33 . 41 . 107,b, No. 167 . 235,a,6 . 18 . 236,a,2 v. u. b,4 . 6 .  BHĀG. P. 2,2,24 .  PAÑCAR. 2,8,9 . 14 .  RĀJA-TAR. 8,2334 .  WEBER, JYOT. 83 . — In der späteren Sprache ist suṣumṇa, suṣumṇā die einzig richtige Schreibart. Vgl. sauṣumṇa.
